metadata.title: ProposalConsequence Data Contract
metadata.notes: Mirrors core.proposal_consequences table. Written by ConsequenceLogService.record(). Governs the ADR-015 D5 attribution read path (find_cause_for_file). Deferred from Wave 1 authoring until Python class existed.

proposal_id.description: The proposal whose execution produced this consequence record.

pre_execution_sha.description: Git HEAD SHA before execution began. Null when git state was unavailable.

post_execution_sha.description: Git HEAD SHA after execution and commit. Null when no commit was produced.

files_changed.description: Repo-relative paths of files modified by this proposal's execution.

findings_resolved.description: Finding IDs (blackboard entry UUIDs) that this proposal addressed.

authorized_by_rules.description: Policy or rule IDs that authorized execution of this proposal.

recorded_at.description: Timestamp when this consequence record was written. Server-set; null on in-memory instances.
